titleStmt.title: SII 38.373: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 373. (A.R. No. 373 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the south wall, of the second prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Achyutadēva Mahārāya Year: Śaka 1452 Vikṛiti, Makara śu. di. 13, Monday. Pūśam = January 30. 1531 A.D.

summary.p: Records that the (pontiff) Īśānaśivachāriyār of Bhīkshā-maṭha, who was also an official of the treasury of the Tirumalar-uḍaiyanayiṉār temple at Dēvakkapuram, the tāṉattār, the māyēśvarars, and the kaikkōḷa-mudaḷigal gave the right of cultivation (kāṇiāṭchchi) of the village Suvarappūṇḍi, a tirunāmakkāṇi village of the Tirumalaruḍaiyār temple inorder to conduct offerings, worship, the maintenance of the sacred lamps, and the performance of temple service (tiruppaṇi) in the Sadāśivamūrtti temple, at Vaḍa-kailāyam, a tirunāmakkāṇi village of the Tirumalar temple, which was built by Tirumalai-Nāyakkar, son of Sadāśiva-nāyakkar, who resided at Marudarasarpaḍaivīḍu. It is further mentioned that Tirumalai-Nāyakkar remitted a sum of three hundred paṇam, as price-money, inorder to reclaim the fallow lands and excavate a big tank to make the lands at the ceded village, fit for cultivation.

It further states that (kāṇi holders) were free to cultivate any crop such as sugarcane, plantain, turmeric, and others and were free to induct cultivators. Taxes such as paḻavari, puduvari, kāṇikkai, kaṭṭāyam, mugampāṟvai and other taxes were also remitted. Īśāna-sivachāriyār, the pontiff and the tāṉattār, Tirumalainambi and others including the temple accountant Uttaṇḍi figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmaṉ makāmaṇṭalecurar metiṉi micura kaṇṭakaṭṭāri cāḷuvaṉ Ariyarāya vipāṭaṉ pāṣaikku tappuvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ muvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭukeṇṭa nāṭu koṭātāṉ Emmaṇṭalamum tiṟaikoṇṭa yinturāya curitaraṇa Irācātirācaṉ rācaparamecuraṉ kecataḷa vipāṭaṉ pātāḷapayaṅkaraṉ Aṭṭatikku maṇṇiyamaṉopayaṅkaraṉ
tulukkataḷavipāṭaṉ tulukkamokaram tavittāṉ pūṟuvatekṣiṇa paccima Uttaracatta camuttirātipati śrīvirappiṟatāpa naracaranāyakkar kumaraṉ Accutaiya tevamakārāyar piṟutivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa cakāṟtam 1000 4 100 5 10 2 melcellā niṉṟa vikuṟutivaruṣattu makaranāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu tiṟaiyoteciyum comavāramum peṟṟa pūcattunāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu
palkuṉṟak koṭṭattu melkuṉṟa nāṭu murukamaṅkalappaṟṟu tevastāṉam tevakkāpuram Uṭaiyār tirumalaruṭaiya nayiṉār śrīpaṇṭārattukku kaṟtar Āṉa pikṣāmaṭam yicāṉacivācāriyarumThese four letters are written below māṭāpattiyam kāḷatticura nāyakkarum eḻuttutāṉattārum māyecurarum kaikkoḷamutalikaḷum Ivvaṉaivarum marutaracarpaṭai viṭṭil Irukkum kaṉṉaṭiyanāyakkarpāṭikaḷil catācivanāyakkar makaṉār tirumalaināyakkar Uṭaiyār tirumalaruṭaiyār
tirunāmakkāṇi Āṉa vaṭakayilāyattil kaṭṭuvitta Uṭaiyavar catācivamuṟttikoyilukku pūcai neyivittiyam tiruviḷakku tiruppaṇikku nāṅkaḷ nāḷatu mutal kāṇiāṭṣiākappaṇṇik kuṭutta tirumalar Uṭaiya nayiṉār tirunāmakkāṇi Āṉa cuvarappūṇṭiyil Ūṟku teṟku muttappaṭaiyar tāṅkal varampaḻa karampu Aṉāti moṟai navamāka tāṅkalum veṭṭi kaḻaṉiyum tiruttik koḷḷattakkatākavum
yitukku Ellai tāṅkalukku kiḻakku maṉṟāṭi Ayyamperumāḷ puṟavaṭaikku tuṉmanāyakkar kollaikku meṟku koṇṭamanāyakkar timmaiyaṉkollaikku vaṭakku Eṭṭikkuḷam kucavaṉkollaikku teṟku Itukku Uḷpaṭṭa nāṟpāṟkellaiyu Aṉāti moṟaiyum kollaiyum Āyi Irukkaiyil puticākat tāṅkalum veṭṭi tāṅkal kiḻ kaḻaṉiyum tirutti nañcai puñcai Uṇṭāṉatukku vilaikkiṟaiyam Āka catāciva nāyakkar
makaṉār tirumalai nāyakkar cuvarappūṇṭi periya Eri veṭṭa kuṭutta ø 3 100 Intap paṇam muṉṉūṟṟukku Inta tāṅkalum nilamum vilai Āka koṇṭu catācivamuṟtikoyil pūcai tiruppaṇikku cantirātittavaraiyum naṭattak kaṭavom Ākavum Inta nilattil māvaṭai maravaṭai vāḻaikarumpu mañcaḷ Iñci veṇṭum payirumyiṭṭu koṇṭu kuṭiyum Eṟṟikkoṇṭu cantirātittavaraiyum Inta nilattil Uṇṭāṉa
kaṭamai Uḷḷatu catācivamuṟtti koyilukku pūcai tiruppaṇikku naṭattakkaṭavom Ākavum Inta nilattukku yātoruvecca viṉiyokam Aramaṉaiyile piṟakku paḻavari putuvari kāṇikkai kaṭṭāyam mukampārvai kopuravācalil piṟakku veccaviṉiyokam mukampārvai EṉṟumThe following is found written below. ivai māṭapattiyam kāḷatticura nāyakkar eḻuttucuvarappūṇṭiyil Ūrveccaviṉiyokam mukampārvai kāṇikkai Eṉṟu keṭkakaṭavom Allavākavum Inta taṉmam
cantirātittavaraiyum naṭattakaṭavom Ākavum Intataṉmattukku yātoruvar Akutam paṉṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkaik karaiyile kārām pacuvaikkoṉṟa pāvattile pokakkaṭavarkaḷ Ākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Inta tāṅkal kāṇiāṭkṣi paṇṇikkuṭuttom Ivai Īśāna śivācāriyar Eḻuttu Ivai tāṉattār tirumalainampi Eḻuttu Ivai tāṉattār cantiranampieḻuttu Ivai māyecurar
tirumalaiccivaṉ kaṅkāṇi Āṇṭār Uḷḷiṭṭa māyecurar Eḻuttu Ivai kaḷappāḷar kāliṅkarāyar kollāviṭṭa vāṇṭarayar Uḷḷiṭṭa kaikkoḷamutaliyaḷ Eḻuttu yippaṭikku yintakalveṭṭu Eḻutiṉamaikku koyilkaṇakku Uttaṇṭar Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.373 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
